title: platostoma ovatum
intro: Platostoma ovatum, also known as the West African blue basil, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Platostoma ovatum include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Platostoma ovatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine in West Africa to promote overall well-being.
